description: Inflexa is a semi-autonomous analysis agent for multi-omics, cheminformatics, and imaging data. It reads the literature, generates hypotheses from both published work and the dataset, runs multiple analytical methods per step, compares results, and traces every finding back to source. The agent tests more hypotheses than manual analysis typically covers, including ones that weren't pre-specified. Every checkpoint is reviewable. Every result links to the input data, code version, and parameters that produced it. Reports include publication-ready figures, reproducible code, and full audit trails. Accepts RNA-seq counts, proteomics tables, VCF files, metabolomics peak lists, compound screens, imaging data, and more.
name: Inflexa
